summary: Audit Mode simplification verified: Templates hidden from sidebar, Form Templates removed from Quick Actions, Internal Forms tab hidden from employee profile, Generate Forms button hidden, profile photo upload with hover effect working. All features tested and passing.
passed_tests: Sidebar shows only: Dashboard, Employees, Compliance Centre, Training, Audit View, Settings
Templates is NOT in sidebar (Audit Mode)
Dashboard Quick Actions shows only: Add New Employee, Compliance Centre
Form Templates is NOT in Quick Actions
Employee profile tabs show only: Overview, Checklist, Documents, Policies, Training, Audit Log
Internal Forms (Admin) tab is NOT visible
Generate Forms button is NOT visible
Employee avatar shows initials (OA for Olakunle Alonge)
Camera icon appears on hover over avatar
Profile photo upload API works (/api/employees/{id}/profile-photo POST)
Profile photo delete API works (/api/employees/{id}/profile-photo DELETE)
Insurance tab shows 1/6 valid insurance documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Mode simplification is complete. Forms system is hidden from UI but backend retained. Key changes: (1) Templates removed from sidebar navigation, (2) Form Templates removed from Dashboard Quick Actions, (3) Internal Forms (Admin) tab removed from employee profile, (4) Generate Forms button removed from employee profile header, (5) Profile photo upload added with camera icon hover effect on avatar.

new_features: Profile photo upload with camera icon hover effect
